title: tillandsia propinqua var. rectangula
intro: Tillandsia propinqua var. rectangula is a type of epiphytic air plant, belonging to the Bromeliad family, native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Tillandsia propinqua var. rectangula include its potential to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing its leaves in water to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
